name: Red Kidney Bean Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the cooked red kidney beans, chopped onion, diced green pepper, steamed and mashed carrot, picante salsa sauce, bread crumbs, whole wheat flour, salt, black pepper, and chili powder until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into equal-sized balls and flatten each ball into patties.
3. Preheat an oven to 450°F (230°C).
4. Place the patties in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or foil.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes, turning the patties once halfway through the cooking time, until they are heated through and lightly browned.
6. Serve the patties on buns or with tortilla chips.
